en: But as for you, teach what accords with sound doctrine.
zh: 至於你，你應當講合乎純正的道理。

en: Older men are to be sober-minded, dignified, self-controlled, sound in faith, in love, and in steadfastness.
zh: 勸年老的男人要有節制、莊重、自律，在信心、愛心、忍耐上都要健全。

en: Older women likewise are to be reverent in behavior, not slanderers or slaves to much wine. They are to teach what is good,
zh: 照樣，勸年老的婦女行為要敬虔，不說讒言，不被酒奴役，用善道教導人，

en: and so train the young women to love their husbands and children,
zh: 好提醒年輕的婦女愛丈夫愛兒女，

en: to be self-controlled, pure, working at home, kind, and submissive to their own husbands, that the word of God may not be reviled.
zh: 並且自律、貞潔、理家、善良、順從自己的丈夫，免得 神的道受毀謗。

en: Likewise, urge the younger men to be self-controlled.
zh: 照樣，勸年輕的男子要自律。

en: Show yourself in all respects to be a model of good works, and in your teaching show integrity, dignity,
zh: 無論在甚麼事上你都要顯出好行為的榜樣，在教導上要純全，要莊重，

en: and sound speech that cannot be condemned, so that an opponent may be put to shame, having nothing evil to say about us.
zh: 言詞要純正，無可指摘，使反對的人因為無從毀謗，就自覺慚愧。

en: Slaves are to be submissive to their own masters in everything; they are to be well-pleasing, not argumentative,
zh: 作奴僕的，要凡事順服自己的主人，討他歡喜，不要頂嘴。

en: not pilfering, but showing all good faith, so that in everything they may adorn the doctrine of God our Savior.
zh: 不要私取財物，卻要顯示絕對的誠實，好使我們救主 神的道理，在凡事上都得著尊榮。

en: For the grace of God has appeared, bringing salvation for all people,
zh: 神拯救萬人的恩典已經顯明出來了。

en: training us to renounce ungodliness and worldly passions, and to live self-controlled, upright, and godly lives in the present age,
zh: 這恩典訓練我們除去不敬虔的心，和屬世的私慾，在今生過著自律、公正、敬虔的生活，

en: waiting for our blessed hope, the appearing of the glory of our great God and Savior Jesus Christ,
zh: 等候那有福的盼望，就是我們偉大的 神，救主耶穌基督榮耀的顯現。

en: who gave himself for us to redeem us from all lawlessness and to purify for himself a people for his own possession who are zealous for good works.
zh: 他為我們捨己，為的是要救贖我們脫離一切不法的事，並且潔淨我們作他自己的子民，熱心善工。

en: Declare these things; exhort and rebuke with all authority. Let no one disregard you.
zh: 你要傳講這些事，運用各樣的權柄去勸戒人，責備人；不要讓人輕看你。
